title: ai chat mod
description: make ai chat in Minecraft. May be ai will be slow, but it still good.
body:
# Minecraft AI Chat Assistant Mod

## **The ai may be make the server slow, or take a long time, I will make new version to fix that**

a ai mod, did you ever try to chat with ai in Minecraft??? If you do, download this mod, and read the readme document (this doc).

the ai is sometimes stubid and not easy to understand what you mean.\
I am trying to make it better.\
AI do not have memery yet.

The mod used ollama for ai.

## 🌟 Key Features
- Chat with AI directly in Minecraft game
- Specialized Minecraft knowledge base

## 💬 Usage Examples
```
/ask_ai How to find diamonds quickly?

/ask_ai What's the crafting recipe for enchantment table?

/ask_ai Give me a modern style villa design
```

## 📌 Important Notes
- Recommend allocating at least 4GB RAM to Minecraft
- Complex questions may take 5-20 seconds to respond

## planning updates
- make it works with other Minecraft versions and other mod loaders
- make ai easier to chat with people
- make ai can generate command in Minecraft
- I will make a show case video.
